design_philosophy: A 'Dark-First' Premium tech portfolio that breaks the generic 'AI' mold. Utilizes a deep obsidian canvas with 'Acid Yellow' high-contrast accents. Merges brutalist grid layouts with luxury glassmorphism to present engineering as a fine art.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[5rem] tracking-tighter font-black leading-none

motion_and_interactions.particle_background: react-tsparticles with subtle gray/white nodes, avoiding generic blue constellations. Low density, slow movement. Or use a custom canvas animation.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Framer Motion staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1) for all section children.

components.button_primary: bg-primary text-text_inverse font-bold px-8 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(204,255,0,0.3)]
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-text_primary px-8 py-3 rounded-full hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all
components.card: bg-surface rounded-2xl border border-border p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-border_highlight transition-all relative overflow-hidden group
components.nav_glass: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70 border-b border-white/10
components.skill_progress: h-1 bg-border rounded-full overflow-hidden; inner bar bg-primary
components.timeline_node: w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-primary ring-4 ring-primary/20
components.timeline_line: absolute left-[5px] top-3 bottom-0 w-px bg-border

instructions_to_main_agent: Extend the tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors and fonts defined in these guidelines.
Use framer-motion for all scroll and reveal animations.
Implement the 'Tracing Beam' effect for project cards using Framer Motion.
Ensure 'react-tsparticles' is used for the hero background, configured to slow-moving, subtle grey/acid-yellow dots.
Use 'react-type-animation' or framer-motion for the typing effect in the hero section.
Implement the Contact form using Shadcn UI Form components, customized to match the dark glassmorphism theme.
Ensure the layout strictly follows the asymmetrical Bento Grid pattern for the skills and projects section.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF). Stick to the color palette provided.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) as requested.
